title: Hnahthial District chhunga National Family Benefit Scheme tanpuina dawng turte thlan chhuah an ni
content:
513/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 14th May, 2026:

Vawiin khan Hnahthial DC pisa-ah Financial year 2024-2025 chhunga National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP) hnuaia National Family Benefit Scheme(NFBS) tanpuina dawngtu turte chu Hnahthial District Level Coordination Committee thukhawm chuan an thlang chhuak a. Thutkhawmna hi Chairman leh Bawrhsap ni bawk, Pi K. Vanlalruati chuan kaihruaiin Member Secretary, Pu CL Joseph, District Social Welfare & Tribal Affairs Officer, Lunglei District/Hnahthial chuan tanpuina dawng thei tura theh luhte chu a chhawp chhuak a ni.

Tun tuma National Family Benefit Scheme (NFBS) tanpuina hi March 2025 hma a chhungkua harsa zual, eizawngtu ber boral chhungte hnena pek tur a ni a. He scheme kaltlang hian boral chhungte thlan chhuah hnenah Rs 20,000 pek an ni ang.

Hnahthial District tan NFBS hamthatna dawng tur mi 10 thlan chhuah niin committee chuan he tanpuina dawng thei tur, hming thehluh zingah a hnuaia tarlan te hi an thlang a ni.

1.    Lalthansangi, Cherhlun Vengthar

2.    C. Kapliana, Chhipphir

3.    K. Lalliankimi, Electric Veng, Hnahthial

4.    Biakliani, Peniel Veng, Hnahthial

5.    Lalawmawii, Tarpho

6.    Zonunsangi, S. Phaileng

7.    Lalramthari, Electric Veng, Hnahthial

8.    C. Lalramsangi, Electric Veng, Hnahthial

9.    Lalthazuali, Muallianpui

10.  Thangropuii, Chhipphir

NFBS hi one time financial assistance niin chhungkaw boral ta hming hian vawi khat bak tanpuina sum hi a dawn theih loh a ni.

Thutkhawmnaah hian Pi Lalrengpuii, Multitasking Assistant bakah Committee Members - Pu HD Lalpekmawia, Project Director; Pu Hmingthanzuala, President Sub-Hqrs YMA; Pu Kawlhmingliana, President MUP leh Pi Lalthanpuii, President MHIP te chu an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM DISTRICT TIN ATAN INDIAN ARMY AGNIVEER LAK LUHNA ONLINE COMMONENTRANCE EXAMINATION (CEE) 01 JUN 2026 ATANGA 15 JUN 2026 THLENG NEIH A NI DAWN
content:
513/2026-2027

Aizawl the 14th May, 2026:Common Entrance Examination : AGNIVEER atana inziak lut tawh candidate-te tan Online Common Entrance Examination (CEE) chu 01 June 2026 atanga 15 June 2026 thleng neih a ni ang. Examination hi ION Digital Zone, Near ITI Veng, Mualpui Road, Mualpui, Aizawl-ah neih a ni ang.

Admit Card : Common Entrance Examination atana Admit Card chu 16 May 2026 atanginwww.joinindianarmy.inah download theih a ni ang. Candidate-te chuan anmahni login ID hmangin Admit Card an download tur a ni. Admit Card download-na tura password chu candidate-te mobile number in register-ah SMS hmangin thawn a ni ang. Candidate-te chuan an Admit Card download hnuah, a print out kengin Common Entrance Examination-ah an tel tur a ni. Admit Card-a thurawn pek zawng zawngte chu candidate-ten an zawm ngei ngei tur a ni.

In report hun : Candidate-te chu exam tan hma darkar khat leh a chanve, minute 90-ah exam centre-ah an awmtur a ni. Exam tan hma darkar chanve, minute 30-ah gate khar a ni ang.

Exam Centre-ah electronic hmanrua ken phal a ni lo.

Admit Card chungchanga zawhna nei chuan a hnuaia address leh contact-ah hian an panin an zawt fiah thei ang:

Army Recruitment Office, Aizawl

Near State Bank of India, Branch Zemabawk

Supply Point Zemabawk, Aizawl (Mizoram)

Tele No - 0389-2351166, 2912730

Email -aizawlaro@gmail.com

title: EDUCATION MINISTER DR. VANLALTHLANA’N UPSC GROOMING SCHEME A HAWNG
content:
512/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 14th May, 2026 :Nimin khan All India Service leh Central Service Mizote kan luh theih nan inbuatsaihna (UPSC Grooming) Mizoram sorkarin a buatsaih chu Education Minister Dr Vanlalthlana chuan a Chamber-ah a hawng a. HSLC Examination 2025-a total mark 405 hmu chin tan dil theih a ni a. Heng mite hian MBSE buatsaihna hnuaia written exam leh personal interview te an neih leh vek hnuin mi 10 thlan chhuah an ni a. He UPSC Grooming Scheme hawnna-ah hian MBSE hotute, MERC, zirlaite, Nu leh pa mai bakah MS Academy hotute an kalkhawm a ni.

Minister Dr Vanlalthlana chuan Central lam dawra Mizo hmel hmuh tur an awm mang lo chu a khawharthlak thu a sawi a. Kan ram thlalaite hian India ram in elna sang ber hmachhawn tur hian kan thei a ni, a ti a. Sorkar hnasang vuantute, ram hmangaih si hlawk zia sawiin, ministerte chu a fawngvuantu nimah ila, a nihna takah chuan kan khawlpui chu kan sorkar mithiamte hi an ni, a ti bawk a. He scheme hi sawrkarin an ngaihpawimawh thu leh tihhlawhtlin ngei a tum thu a sawi a. Hemi tana hma lo la tu zawng zawng MBSE hotute, Mizoram Educational Reform Committee (MERC) te chungah lawmthu a sawi a ni.

He hunah hian MERC Member Dr. Rohmingmawii pawhin thusawiin he scheme hi naupanlai atanga Catch them Young ang kha a ni, a ti a. He inelna atan hian bul tan hma a ngai a, nachang hria minister leh buaipuitu MBSE hotute chungah lawmthu a sawi. MBSE Chairman, Pu JH Zoremthanga pawhin uluk taka naupang an thlan dan te a tlangpuiin a report bawk.

Mizoram Coaching centre hrang hrangte proposal thehluh zingah hma lo la turin MS Academy, Khatla chu thlan a ni a. He scheme hi kum tin tih chhoh tum a ni a, thlan chhuahte hi kum 5 chhung tuaihriam (Grooming) an ni ang a. UPSC exam tura naupanlai atanga rilru leh taksa lo insawizawina scheme a ni.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN MCAB IN RBI SCHEDULED STATUS AN NIH AN LAWMNA A TELPUI
content:
507/2026-2027

Aizawl the 14th May 2026 :Nizan khan Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank te chuan Reserve Bank of India hnuaia Scheduled Bank an hmuh lawmna, Aijal Club-ah an nei a. Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan khuallian niin a telpui. Pu PC Vanlalruata, Cooperation Minister chu khualzahawm a ni.

Thusawiin Chief Minister chuan, Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank-in RBI Scheduled Bank Status a hmuh vanga lawm ber zinga mi niin ka inhria a. Scheduled Bank Status pek a nih thu ka hriat rualin ka Social Media kaltlangin lawmpuina ka tichhuak a. Gazette a rawn chhuah khan lawmpuina ka rawn tichhuak leh a. Achievement thuhmuna tum hnih lawmpuina ka siam awm chhun a la ni hial awm e, a ti.

A thusawi dangte chu :

1. Apex Bank hi Mizo mipuite ta liau liau a ni a, a lo pian khan a thiltum lian ber chu Mizoram mipuiten eizawnna ngelnghet an neih theih nana hmalak a ni a. Vawiin thlengin chu rilru pu chung chuan a la kal a, a thlen chin apiangah mipuite pawhin kan chhawr tangkai a ni.

2. Tunah hian in CD Ratio hi 65.93 a ni a, Mizorama CD ratio tha ber a ni mekin ka hria a. ATM neih tam lamah pawh hian SBI dawttu in ni mek tih ka lo hria a. Mizo tawng ngata inziak ATM 45 in enkawl mek a ni.

3. Biak In sakna Loan Scheme, a bik taka duan in han nei te hi a lawmawm a. Ni tina sum leh pai dahkhawl duhte tana Pigmy Deposit Collector in han duang chhuak te hi – mi retheite tana ding in nihzia tilangtu a ni.

4. Apex bank hi India rama PACS leh M-PACS kalpui tha ber zinga mi in ni a. National Performance Award pawh a kum zawnin tum hnih lai in dawng tihte kan lo hria a.

5. Internet Banking lamah pawh Bank lian zawkte tih theih ang chu in ti ve thei deuh vek tawh a. Tunah chuan inter banking transfer-ah hma in sawn lehzual dawn a ni.

6. Thingtlang lamah inzar zau zel ula thain ka hria a. Thingtlang mipuite rin, an ban phaka inchhawp, Mizo tawnga dawr theih in nih chuan; in tan customer rinawm tak an ni zui ngeiin ka ring.

7. Kan sorkar ngaihpawimawh em em chu Credit – Deposit Ratio hi a ni. RBI chuan Bank-te chu an CD Ratio 60% tal ni turin a beisei a, benchmark a siam a. Sorkar pawhin he benchmark hi tlin vek turin kan beisei a ni.

8. Kan Bank tam takte hian thingtlang an thleng phak lo va, khawpuiah chuah branch an nei a. Heng inzarpharh tha lo bank-te hi CD ratio nei hniam an ni tlangpui lehnghal a. Anni hi kan tangkaipui meuh em tih hi kan inzawt fo a ni.

9. Kan sorkar hian kan Bank-te nena thawkho va, mi harsate khaichhuahna scheme – Hand Holding kan kalpui mek a. Kan Policy lian ber zinga mi a nih avangin kan Policy tihhlawhtlinna hmanraw pawimawh tak chu Bank te hi in ni, tih te a ni a.

RBI Scheduled Status chuan dinhmun sang zawkah a hlangkai ngeia a rin thu sawiin, an kal zelna turah duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Pu PC Vanlalruata, Minister pawhin thu a sawi a. MCAB in RBI scheduled status a hmu hi ka lawm hle a. A hminga Cooperation Minister ka nih laia lo thleng a ni a, vannei pawh ka inti hle. He dinhmuna MCAB a din theih chhan hi Bank thuneitute leh thawktute thawhrimna te, Cooperation Department hmalakna vang te a ni tih ka hria a. An zaa chungah lawmthu ka sawi a ni, a ti.

Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank hi kum 1982 khan sum lu (share capital) cheng nuaih sawmparuk vel (Rs. 16.53 lakh) leh thawktu mi 16 ten nen bultan a ni a. Rambuai lai a nih avangin a tir lamah hian banking lama thiamna nei chhawr tur pawh an hmu lawk lo va ni. Tunah chuan MCAB hian branch 35, ATM 45 leh thawktu 248 leh vengtu 106 a nei tawh a. Tun Financial tawpah khan Deposit Rs. 1929.53 Crore leh Advances Rs. 1272. 11 Crore a nei a, Profit Rs. 40.39 Crore hmuin a CD ratio chu 65.93 a ni a. Mizoramah a sang ber a ni.

Reserve Bank of India chuan kumin March ni 12 khan Scheduled Bank atan a rawn pawm a ni.

MCAB RBI Scheduled Bank a nih lawmnaah hian Rev. Dr. K. Lallawmzuala chuan hunserh a hmang a. Pu Udit Prakash Rai, Commissioner, Cooperation Department, Pu T. Lhumding, General Manager, RBI, Mizoram leh Pu Bhaskar Manta, DGM, NABARD ten lawmpuina thu tawi an sawi bawk.

Attachment
